title: Error payload (stderr)
description: The structured error every subject emits to STDERR in --json mode on any failure — the CliError shape {code, message, remediation} already emitted by the template chassis. Text mode renders as 'error: <message>' + 'hint: <remediation>'. This shape predates the contract and carries no schema_version. Exit code equals `code`: 1 user error, 2 environment error.

code.description: The process exit code: 1 user error, 2 environment error, 3+ reserved.

remediation.description: Actionable hint for the driving agent; may be empty but must be present.
